title: Pale Garden Effects
description: A VFX mod focused on the Pale Garden! Formerly Pale World Effects!
body:
![An image of text that says "Pale World FX" in a Minecraft font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dadd91b38f0d754e154b028c9bf24ff4c475ab6.png)
This is a standalone mod that contains just the FX from my mod [Pale World](https://modrinth.com/mod/paleworld), because sometimes you just want to play a prettier vanilla Minecraft. **_Current Features:_** * Pale Garden Fog * Open Eyeblossoms emit light ## Compatibility: * Hasn't been tested with any mods adding similar features * Fog will not render with Iris installed _with_ a shader in use, but otherwise works. * Compatible with Fog, though I am able to exercise less control so it may appear differently.
